_doc: Walkthrough bundle: 4 apply entries collapse 20 hand-written DCOBUF expr rows (5 clock nets × {Freq, DutyC, Rtime, Ftime}) into one measure-bundle JSON. Renders byte-for-byte equal to the source rows — see tests/test_builtins_walkthrough.py. The dco2g_supplies.siggroup.json fixture in this directory is intentionally NOT referenced here: its 4 nets share basenames (/VDD, /VDD, /PLUS, /PLUS) and would collide on output_name under v1 short_alias+basename naming. The user's source CSV disambiguates such cases by hand-numbering (Iavg_1, Iavg_2, ...); the framework will need a per-signal alias map in v2 to absorb that idiom natively.
name: dco2g_review
